accurate.why: Accurately states the resolution terminates the COVID-19 national emergency declared March 13, 2020.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; COVID-19 is accurate real-world context for the emergency.

states_purpose.why: Directly and clearly states the purpose.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Implicitly addresses the change by stating the emergency is terminated, which is the operative legal effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: No effective date is mentioned but the bill has immediate effect on approval; omitting is acceptable for a high-level summary.

major_provisions_covered.why: The single provision (termination) is fully captured.

coherent.why: Clear, single sentence is internally consistent.

concise.why: Maximally concise for the bill's scope.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the President and the March 13, 2020 declaration.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
